top_findings: tabler-icons.woff2 is 807 KB for only 55 used icons — biggest performance issue
FAQPage schema missing on /faq — 30+ Q&As with zero rich result eligibility
site.webmanifest uses external CDN for 512x512 icon — fragile PWA dependency
/apply page missing from XML sitemap — Google cannot discover it organically
humans.txt lists PHP 8.2/MySQL — incorrect tech stack erodes crawl trust
quick_wins: Add FAQPage JSON-LD to /faq — 30 min, immediate rich result eligibility
Convert review-1.png to WebP — saves 50 KB, 5 min
Add /apply to sitemap — 5 min in next-sitemap.config.js

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt served via Next.js route — works in dev + prod
XML sitemap with image extension on /portfolio
Canonical tags on all pages via buildMetadata()
All security headers set (CSP, X-Frame, etc.)

findings.title: /apply page missing from sitemap
findings.description: The /apply editor recruitment page has no sitemap entry. Google cannot discover it without a link from another indexed page.
findings.recommendation: Add to SITEMAP_URLS in constants.ts and next-sitemap.config.js priorities map with priority 0.7

findings.title: site.webmanifest uses external CDN for 512x512 icon
findings.description: The 512x512 PWA icon and screenshot point to i.ibb.co and iili.io. Free CDNs with no SLA.
findings.recommendation: Self-host favicon-512.png and pwa-screenshot.png in /public

findings.title: Social redirect pages may be indexed
findings.description: /facebook, /instagram etc. redirect to social profiles. If missing noindex, they may appear in SERPs.
findings.recommendation: Add robots: { index: false, follow: true } to each social redirect page's metadata

findings.title: humans.txt lists PHP 8.2/MySQL — site is Next.js
findings.description: Incorrect tech stack in humans.txt misleads crawlers and security scanners.
findings.recommendation: Update to: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Supabase, Vercel

findings.title: llms.txt dated June 17, 2026 — 1 month stale
findings.description: AI assistants cache llms.txt. Stale information leads to incorrect AI responses about the business.
findings.recommendation: Update monthly — especially dates, pricing, and service availability

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: All 13 content pages have unique, keyword-focused titles and meta descriptions
llms.txt v14.0 — comprehensive GEO preparation with cited statistics
FAQ page has 30+ Q&A pairs — strong content depth
About page with founder story — good E-E-A-T signals
Blog-like content depth in FAQ covering all major buyer questions

findings.title: FAQ content not exposed as FAQPage schema
findings.description: 30+ Q&As exist with zero FAQPage markup — rich result opportunity wasted.
findings.recommendation: Generate FAQPage JSON-LD from FAQ_SECTIONS data array in faq/page.tsx

findings.title: AggregateRating based on only 7 reviews
findings.description: Google may suppress star ratings in SERPs below ~10 reviews.
findings.recommendation: Encourage reviews and update reviewCount. Add individual Review schemas.

findings.title: No blog or content marketing
findings.description: No articles targeting informational queries (thumbnail tips, editing costs, etc.).
findings.recommendation: Publish 4-6 pillar articles targeting high-intent creator queries

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Internal linking across nav, footer, and CTAs

findings.title: No RSS/feed autodiscovery link in <head>
findings.description: Feed route exists but no <link> tag — browsers and feed readers can't discover it.
findings.recommendation: Add alternates.types in root metadata: 'application/feed+json': SITE_URL + '/feed.json'

findings.title: OpenSearch description not linked in <head>
findings.description: opensearch.xml exists as a route but no <link rel='search'> in head.
findings.recommendation: Add <link rel='search' type='application/opensearchdescription+xml' href='/opensearch.xml'>

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: WebSite with SearchAction (sitelinks search box eligible)
Organization with aggregateRating, founder, areaServed, OfferCatalog

findings.title: No FAQPage schema on /faq
findings.description: 30+ Q&As present, zero FAQPage markup. Rich results blocked.
findings.recommendation: Generate FAQPage JSON-LD from FAQ_SECTIONS array

findings.title: No VideoObject schema
findings.description: Video editing agency with no VideoObject markup anywhere.
findings.recommendation: Add VideoObject to any portfolio entries that embed or link video

findings.title: No HowTo schema on /workflow
findings.description: 3-step workflow described in text. HowTo schema would enable rich result.
findings.recommendation: Add HowTo JSON-LD with 3 HowToStep items to workflow/page.tsx

findings.title: BreadcrumbList missing on most pages
findings.description: Only /faq has BreadcrumbList. Missing on 6+ other content pages.
findings.recommendation: Add breadcrumb generation to buildMetadata() helper in lib/metadata.ts

findings.title: No individual Review schemas
findings.description: aggregateRating present but no individual Review items in Organization schema.
findings.recommendation: Add review[] array to Organization JSON-LD with all 7 reviews

categories.name: Performance
what_works: Critical/deferred CSS split (just implemented — 807 KB deferred)

findings.title: tabler-icons.woff2 is 807 KB — only 55 icons used
findings.description: Full Tabler icon font (~5500 icons) preloaded on every page. Only 55 icon classes used (~1% of the font).
findings.recommendation: Subset with pyftsubset or switch to @tabler/icons-react SVG imports. Expected savings: 760+ KB

findings.title: PaperInko.woff2 is 168 KB — not subsetted
findings.description: Display font covers full character set. English-only site only needs Latin.
findings.recommendation: Subset to U+0020-007F, U+00A0-00FF. Expect ~50 KB result.

findings.title: review-1.png is PNG (76 KB) — all others are WebP
findings.description: Inconsistent format. PNG at 76 KB vs WebP peers at 8-50 KB.
findings.recommendation: cwebp -q 82 review-1.png -o review-1.webp

findings.title: founder.jpg is 162 KB JPEG
findings.description: next/image auto-converts for browsers but source is large. OG image serves raw JPEG.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP. cwebp -q 85 founder.jpg -o founder.webp

findings.title: No Speculation Rules API
findings.description: Hover-triggered prerender would make navigation feel instant.
findings.recommendation: Add speculation rules script to layout <head> with eagerness: 'moderate'

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: llms.txt v14.0 — comprehensive with brand disambiguation, cited stats, AI guidance
robots.txt allows major AI crawlers (Googlebot, Bingbot, Applebot)
X-Content-Signal header for AI crawler trust
Organization entity sufficient for Knowledge Panel candidacy

findings.title: llms.txt 1 month stale
findings.description: Dated June 17, 2026. AI systems cache this file.
findings.recommendation: Update monthly. Current date: July 17, 2026

categories.name: Images
what_works: No empty alt attributes found anywhere
First 3 portfolio items use eager loading

findings.title: review-1.png is PNG not WebP
findings.description: 76 KB PNG. All other review images are WebP.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP

findings.title: founder.jpg is JPEG
findings.description: 162 KB source. next/image optimizes delivery but source conversion reduces disk use.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Subset tabler-icons.woff2 from 807 KB to ~40 KB

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add BreadcrumbList to all content pages
Convert review-1.png and founder.jpg to WebP
Add noindex to social redirect pages

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Grow review count to 10+ for aggregateRating display
Add individual Review schemas to Organization

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Submit sitemap to Google Search Console
Monitor CrUX Core Web Vitals (field data)
Track FAQ page CTR before/after FAQPage schema
Keep Tabler icon subset updated as new icons are added
